violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Per PIC, in process of taking class. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the prep unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Guidance document provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. PIC stated they will switch to bleach until dispenser is fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Cheese and ham was observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC recently moved to top prep unit from the walk-In. Food relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the prep unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The top rail of the prep unit was unable to maintain foods at 41 degrees or less. Per PIC, unit will get serviced. Top of unit to not be used until able to maintain food temperatures. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
Stoppers are lacking for the 3-bay sink. Stoppers to be purchased. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener placed in 3-bay. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Several burrows were observed by the dumpster area. PIC stated burrows will be collapsed and pest control will treat. Currently using USA pest control 1x monthly. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
Various shelving was observed with grease and debris. Shelves to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
The facility is lacking stoppers for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
